summary: Outstanding soundboard recording with crystal‑clear audio, though no specific performance details were mentioned.
review: The reviewer rates this tape a perfect five stars and praises the sound as “as good as it gets,” indicating an excellent soundboard source with superb clarity. No comments on the musical performance or setlist are provided, so the show quality cannot be evaluated from this review alone.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights excellent recording quality; lack of performance details limits confidence in overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the sound is as good as can be gotten, implying a clear, well‑balanced mix with no reported issues.
